name: Prelegal Legal Document Template Catalog
description: Catalog of standard legal agreement templates sourced from Common Paper (https://github.com/CommonPaper) and licensed under CC BY 4.0. Each entry maps a template to its markdown file in the templates/ directory.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Standard Terms for a mutual NDA that lets each party disclose confidential information for a defined purpose, covering use, protection, exclusions, and return of confidential information. Used together with its cover page.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Fill-in cover page for the Mutual NDA that captures the parties, effective date, purpose, and any modifications to the standard terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for providing access to a hosted cloud (SaaS) service, covering access and use, support, fees, data, warranties, and liability.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for an early-access design partner program in which a partner gets early access to a product and provides feedback to help develop and improve it.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Service level terms for a cloud service, defining target uptime, how availability and downtime are calculated, exclusions, and service credit remedies.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for professional/consulting services delivered under statements of work (SOWs), covering services, change orders, fees, IP ownership, and warranties.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Data processing addendum governing how a provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, addressing controller/processor roles, subprocessors, security, and data subject rights.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Agreement licensing installable software to a customer, covering license grant, permitted uses, support, fees, IP, warranties, and liability.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Business partnership agreement defining each party's obligations, payment and taxes, intellectual property, confidentiality, and general terms of cooperation.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for a time-limited pilot or evaluation of a product, granting limited access and use for evaluation purposes with associated terms and restrictions.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA business associate agreement setting out a provider's obligations and restrictions on the use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI).

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum adding terms for AI-powered services to an existing agreement, covering use of inputs and outputs, restrictions, and model training.
